# harbour Provider

The Harbour provider issues and manages certificates in a Harbour private PKI deployment. It authenticates to the Harbour API using AWS SigV4 (execute-api).



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoint` (String) Harbour API endpoint URL.

### Optional

- `profile` (String) AWS profile name.
- `region` (String) AWS region for SigV4 signing. Defaults to AWS_REGION / AWS_DEFAULT_REGION.
- `role_arn` (String) IAM role ARN to assume for API calls (e.g. the harbour-customer-{env} role).
